title: tragacantha chlorostachys
intro: Tragacantha chlorostachys, also known as the prickly thistle or Sutherland's globular milk thistle, is a species of spiny-leaved perennial plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to be used for medicinal purposes.
